message:
feat(pt-core): Implement CPU tick-delta features (k_ticks/n_ticks/u/u_cores)

Implements Plan §3.2 CPU occupancy features:
- k_ticks: CPU time consumed (utime + stime delta)
- n_ticks: Tick budget (CLK_TCK * Δt * min(N_eff_cores, threads))
- u: CPU occupancy ratio, clamped to [0, 1]
- u_cores: CPU cores worth of utilization
- n_eff: Effective sample size with configurable correction policy

Includes:
- TickSnapshot for raw /proc/[pid]/stat data
- TickDeltaFeatures for computed features
- Provenance tracking (CLK_TCK, threads, N_eff_cores, constraint)
- NEffPolicy enum for Identity, FixedReduction, Autocorrelation
- 9 unit tests covering parsing, delta computation, and policies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
